headline: Should You Forget PayPal (PYPL) and Buy American Express (AXP) Instead?
summary: The blue chip financial giant has a brighter future than the digital payments leader.

headline: Stablecoin firms bet big on AI agent payments that barely exist
summary: Two weeks ago, a Citrini Research scenario imagining AI agents routing around card network fees sent Visa Inc., Mastercard Inc. and American Express Co. shares tumbling as much as 5% in a single session.  On its Feb. 25 earnings call, Circle Chief Executive Officer Jeremy Allaire argued that stablecoins could become the native currency of machine-to-machine commerce.

headline: Berkshire CEO Greg Abel on working with Buffett, Kraft Heinz and using all his salary to buy the stock

headline: New CEO Greg Abel Did Not List 2 of Berkshire Hathaway's Largest Equity Positions as "Core Holdings." Are They on the Chopping Block?
